creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
maho        2008-09-08 00:34:17 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    math/octave-forge-base Makefile pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Add math/octave-forge-base.
  
  This baseport provides the basic directory structure.  Deleting this package
  will completely erase all the structure, and remaining files, associated with
  the octave packaging system.  This is useful if things go wrong with the
  octave packaging system.
  
  (The octave-forge package is the result of The GNU Octave Repositry project,
  which is intended to be a central location for custom scripts, functions and
  extensions for GNU Octave. contains the source for all the functions plus
  build and install scripts.)
  
  PR:             127030
  Submitted by:   Stephen Montgomery-Smith <stephen@math.missouri.edu>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.489     +1 -0      ports/math/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/math/octave-forge-base/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/math/octave-forge-base/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/math/octave-forge-base/pkg-plist (new)
